claim: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Full purge uninstall requires an explicit DELETE DINOBRAIN confirmation unless -Yes is passed, and removes app repo, data repo, portable Node, DinoBrain launchers, and DinoBrain config/hook backups.
